tasks.goal: Fix foundational drawer logic within the base template for consistency across the application.
escalate_if: Unexpected conflicts with other global components

tasks.goal: Align the kanban board's drawer implementation with the updated base logic.
deliverables: Updated board.html with compatible drawer logic
escalate_if: Workorder view data is missing required drawer context
Board-specific drawer behavior cannot be reconciled with base

forbidden_moves: Modifying core workorder business logic in models
required_checks: Verify drawer opens/closes correctly on mobile
Check for Z-index issues with kanban cards
acceptance_criteria: Drawer works consistently on the board page and other pages
No JS errors in console when interacting with the drawer

tasks.goal: Improve the visual appearance and layout of the kanban board components.
deliverables: Updated app.css with kanban polish styles
escalate_if: CSS changes cause regressions in other parts of the app

required_checks: Verify layout on multiple screen sizes
Check hover and active states on kanban cards

tasks.goal: Structure the navigation sidebar in the base template.
deliverables: New sidebar HTML structure in base.html
escalate_if: Main content area becomes too cramped

tasks.goal: Style the navigation sidebar and ensure responsive behavior.
escalate_if: CSS overlaps with other fixed position elements

forbidden_moves: Hardcoding navigation links without using url tags
required_checks: Verify navigation links point to correct URLs
acceptance_criteria: Sidebar is present and functional on all pages extending base.html
Sidebar responds correctly to screen size changes
